name: Thalassa Vaugrenard
summary: Creative UX/UI Designer with 5 years of experience crafting intuitive digital interfaces and user-centered experiences. Proven track record in leading design sprints and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact mobile and web applications.

experience.title: Mid-level UX/UI Designer
experience.description: Lead design efforts for enterprise clients, focusing on accessibility and design system maintenance. Conducted user research and usability testing to improve conversion rates by 25%.

experience.title: Product Designer
experience.description: Designed end-to-end user flows for a fintech mobile app. Collaborated closely with developers to ensure pixel-perfect implementation and maintained the component library.

experience.title: Junior UI Designer
experience.description: Assisted in the creation of wireframes and high-fidelity prototypes for e-commerce platforms. Participated in client workshops and design critique sessions.

education.degree: Master of Arts in Interaction Design
Bachelor of Fine Arts in Graphic Design
education.institution: Ecole Nationale Superieure des Arts Decoratifs
